description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that runs on every push. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a privileged container using the bilelmoussaoui/flatpak-github-actions:kde-6.7 image. Check out the repository and use the flatpak-builder action to build a Flatpak bundle from a manifest at ./cmake/Deployment/Linux/Flatpak/io.ossia.score.yml, caching the build with a key based on the commit SHA.
